Home / Guides

Signature Size for Exam Forms

Indian exam portals often ask for a scanned signature in JPG format with strict dimensions and a file size such as 10KB to 50KB. The exact size depends on the exam notification.

Common signature settings

  • 140 x 60 px for compact forms
  • 160 x 60 px for many recruitment portals
  • 200 x 80 px when a clearer signature is allowed
  • JPG format under 20KB or 50KB, depending on the portal

Best scanning method

Sign on plain white paper using a black or dark blue pen. Crop close to the signature and remove extra white space before resizing. Avoid shadows and blurry phone photos.

Use Signature Resize to resize and compress your signature for exam forms directly in your browser.
